executionValidation: Every C code_input has deterministic fixed tests and complete starterFiles and solutionFiles.
The official solution must compile and pass the same tests published to learners.
The entry file is main.c and reusable data structures are implemented in named .h/.c pairs.
pedagogy: Use algorithm_animation for recursive trees, pointer links, tree balancing, stack transfers, and heap insertion paths.
Do not hide memory ownership or pointer invariants when they are central to the lesson.
